match.userMessage:
Classify music design for each scene and generate a unified music prompt for the sequence.

<SCENES>
[
  {

  },
  {

  {
    "sceneId": "scene_5",
    "title": "Exiting to the Street",

    "durationSeconds": 5,
    "location": "EXT. STREET OUTSIDE STUDIO - MORNING",
    "timeOfDay": "morning",
    "visualSummary": "Fresh morning transition, bright airy outdoor energy, sense of forward motion and new beginning"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_6",
    "title": "Walking the Promenade",
    "storyBeat": "Scarlett walks along the promenade toward the beach",
    "durationSeconds": 7,

  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_8",
    "title": "Planting the Lipstick",

    "durationSeconds": 8,
    "location": "EXT. BEACH SHORELINE - MORNING",

  },

    "sceneId": "scene_9",
    "title": "Entering the Water",

    "location": "EXT. BEACH SHORELINE - MORNING",

  {
    "sceneId": "scene_10",

    "timeOfDay": "morning",
    "visualSummary": "Serene joyful coastal morning with sensory fresh energy"
  }
]
</SCENES>

For each scene, classify:
1. presence: "none"|"minimal"|"moderate"|"full"
2. style: Genre/instrumentation (if music present)
3. mood: Emotional quality (if music present)
4. atmosphere: Environmental atmosphere

Then synthesize unified tags (starting with "instrumental") and a 1-2 sentence prompt for one cohesive music track.

Respond with ONLY valid JSON matching the schema.
